text.title: UI Component Library Examples
text.summary: Button and Input component implementations demonstrating forwardRef, variant system, ARIA, and CSS modules.

example.note: forwardRef + displayName. asChild uses Radix Slot. Decorative icons are aria-hidden. isLoading disables to prevent double-submit.

section.title: Input component with ARIA

example.note: useId for stable IDs. aria-invalid + aria-describedby wired to error/helper. role="alert" on error announces to screen readers.

section.reference: Scaffold component folder with tsx, css, stories, barrel update
